meaning: 因斯布鲁克[奥地利西部城市]
examples: From now on, he would live and work from a modest rented apartment in Innsbruck, he said。
Mr Sanader has strong links to Austria and once studied at the University of Innsbruck.
People in Tirol injured by avalanche during 1994–2005 and admitted to the Innsbruck Medical University Hospital were included.
Innsbruck in Austria is the closest airport to the Val Gardena (two hours by car).
Obergurgl is a tiny, isolated resort community near the Italian border south of Innsbruck.
